name: db_only_phase_wave3_orient_and_registry_truth
outcome_goal: Orient, workflow invocation, receipt search, and reference resolution all point at canonical runtime authority rather than partial or fake lookup paths.
anti_requirements: Do not re-open reference catalog seeding as fresh build work if the DB already proves it populated.
Do not keep workflow invocation as a spec-name-only path when workflowId-backed truth exists.
Do not widen into authority-cleanup provider runtime or command-bus packets.

jobs.label: orient_packet_contract
jobs.prompt: Make orient the canonical instruction authority for this lane. Tighten the orient/operator surfaces so roadmap-backed truth, queue refs, and current-state notes are what downstream packets read first instead of ad hoc file or chat assumptions.

jobs.label: workflow_invoke_wiring_proof
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-8B0E04AD` by proving workflow invocation stays on the integration path with workflowId-backed wiring. Do not leave the runtime falling off into spec-name-only or faux integration behavior.

jobs.label: receipt_search_truth
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-DDB3AA43` by making `dag-dispatch/search_receipts` perform real receipt search, not spec-name lookup masquerading as search. Keep the search surface read-only and evidence-backed.

jobs.label: reference_catalog_regression_closeout
jobs.prompt: Treat `BUG-CDB5894B` as regression closeout, not fresh seeding work. Verify the populated `reference_catalog` remains usable by compiler and subsystem sync paths, then add only the smallest proof coverage or comments needed to keep that state explicit.
